hero.title: Cozy Rooms in Bishkek — from 2,000 som
hero.subtitle: Putnik Guest House — your home away from home. Pool, sauna, billiards. Book online right now.

rooms.title: Our Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Comfortable rooms for any budget and occasion

amenities.title: Why Choose Putnik
amenities.pool_desc: Indoor pool with warm water available for all hotel guests.
amenities.sauna_desc: Finnish sauna and hammam for full relaxation and recovery.
amenities.billiards_desc: Billiard table in the recreation area for pleasant leisure.
amenities.wifi_desc: High-speed internet in all rooms and common areas.
amenities.checkin_desc: We work without days off, check-in and check-out at any time.

pricing.title: Transparent Prices
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees — everything included
pricing.discount_note: Discounts for long stays. Ask the administrator.

footer.description: Cozy guest house in Bishkek with pool, sauna and billiards. Open 24/7.
footer.hours_value: Around the clock, 7 days a week

about.title: About Putnik Guest House
about.history: Putnik Guest House is a cozy place for rest and accommodation in Bishkek. We welcome guests around the clock and create a homely atmosphere for each guest.
about.value1_desc: We carefully monitor the cleanliness of every room and common area.
about.value2_desc: Comfortable beds, modern interior and all necessary amenities.
about.value3_desc: Fair prices without hidden fees for every guest.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.faq1_a: Yes, private guarded parking for guests.
contacts.faq2_q: Can I check in at night?
contacts.faq2_a: Yes, we operate 24/7, check-in at any time.
contacts.faq3_a: Yes, the indoor pool is available to all hotel guests.
contacts.faq4_q: What is the minimum rental period?
contacts.faq5_a: Yes, fill out the form on the website and we will contact you within 15 minutes.
contacts.directions: The hotel is located in the Pervomaysky district of Bishkek. Landmark: 81B Khudaybergenova St. Private parking for guests.
contacts.parking_desc: Free guarded parking on the hotel premises.
